title: CanonicalTransaction
description: The canonical, vendor-neutral representation of a fuel dispensing transaction. Version 1.

fccTransactionId.description: Opaque transaction ID from the FCC. Dedup key with siteCode.

siteCode.description: Site where dispense occurred. Dedup key with fccTransactionId.

nozzleNumber.description: Physical nozzle number on the pump.

productCode.description: Canonical product code after mapping (e.g., PMS, AGO, IK, UNKNOWN).

volumeMicrolitres.description: Dispensed volume in microlitres (1 L = 1,000,000 uL). Max 50,000 L.

amountMinorUnits.description: Total transaction amount in minor currency units (e.g., cents).

unitPriceMinorPerLitre.description: Price per litre in minor currency units.

completedAt.description: Dispense completion time in UTC (ISO 8601). Must be >= startedAt.

fiscalReceiptNumber.description: Fiscal receipt reference if FCC fiscalizes directly. Null otherwise.

fccVendor.description: FCC vendor that produced this transaction.

attendantId.description: Attendant/operator identifier from FCC. Null if not captured.

legalEntityId.description: Legal entity owning the site. Denormalized for row-level scoping.

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for monetary fields on this transaction.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the transaction.

ingestionSource.description: Which ingestion path delivered this transaction.

rawPayloadRef.description: S3 URI referencing the archived raw FCC payload. Null on Edge Agent.

rawPayloadJson.description: Inline raw FCC payload JSON. Used on Edge Agent. Null on Cloud.

ingestedAt.description: UTC timestamp when middleware first received and persisted this transaction.

updatedAt.description: UTC timestamp of last status change. Must be >= ingestedAt.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the canonical model schema used.

odooOrderId.description: Odoo order reference stamped when Odoo acknowledges. Null until acknowledged.

preAuthId.description: FK to PreAuthRecord when matched via reconciliation. Null for normal orders.

reconciliationStatus.description: Reconciliation outcome. Null for normal orders at non-pre-auth sites.

isDuplicate.description: Whether flagged as potential duplicate by secondary dedup check.

duplicateOfId.description: If isDuplicate=true, references the original transaction's id.
